description: multiple default shared RUN caches normalize aliases, persist across steps and builds, and stay out of rootfs checkpoints

writes.Dockerfile:
FROM base
WORKDIR /work
ENV CACHE_TARGET=/cache//tmp/../../oracle-cache-default-a/
ARG TOKEN=two
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=$CACHE_TARGET --mount=type=cache,target=oracle-cache-default-relative sh -euxc 'absolute=0; relative=0; test ! -f /oracle-cache-default-a/count || absolute=$(cat /oracle-cache-default-a/count); test ! -f oracle-cache-default-relative/count || relative=$(cat oracle-cache-default-relative/count); absolute=$((absolute+1)); relative=$((relative+1)); printf %s $absolute >/oracle-cache-default-a/count; printf %s $relative >oracle-cache-default-relative/count; printf %s $TOKEN >/oracle-cache-default-a/token'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/oracle-cache-default-a --mount=type=cache,target=./oracle-cache-default-relative/ sh -euxc 'mkdir -p /oracle; cp /oracle-cache-default-a/count /oracle/absolute-count; cp oracle-cache-default-relative/count /oracle/relative-count; cp /oracle-cache-default-a/token /oracle/token'

transitions.name: failed-run-retains-cache

writes.Dockerfile:
FROM base
WORKDIR /work
ARG TOKEN=failed
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/oracle-cache-default-a --mount=type=cache,target=./oracle-cache-default-relative/ sh -euxc 'printf retained >/oracle-cache-default-a/failed-write; printf retained >oracle-cache-default-relative/failed-write; exit 17'

transitions.spore_diagnostic: spore build: Dockerfile line 4: instruction failed: RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/oracle-cache-default-a --mount=type=cache,target=./oracle-cache-default-relative/ sh -euxc 'printf retained >/oracle-cache-default-a/failed-write; printf retained >oracle-cache-default-relative/failed-write; exit 17'

transitions.name: failed-run-remains-uncached
transitions.spore_diagnostic: spore build: Dockerfile line 4: instruction failed: RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/oracle-cache-default-a --mount=type=cache,target=./oracle-cache-default-relative/ sh -euxc 'printf retained >/oracle-cache-default-a/failed-write; printf retained >oracle-cache-default-relative/failed-write; exit 17'

writes.Dockerfile:
FROM base
WORKDIR /work
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/oracle-cache-default-a --mount=type=cache,target=oracle-cache-default-relative sh -euxc 'test "$(cat /oracle-cache-default-a/failed-write)" = retained; test "$(cat oracle-cache-default-relative/failed-write)" = retained; mkdir -p /oracle; printf recovered >/oracle/failure-cache'
RUN sh -euxc 'test ! -e /oracle-cache-default-a; test ! -e /work/oracle-cache-default-relative'
